briefs.title: BC Tightens Environmental Penalties and Contaminated Soil Rules — August 2026 Deadline
briefs.summary: BC updated five environmental regulations, changing how fines are calculated and tightening rules around contaminated soil movement and open burning. A second round of penalty changes takes effect August 1, 2026.
briefs.action_required: Review your contaminated soil disposal and open burning practices before August 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Administrative Penalties (Environmental Management Act) amendments take effect
